func_hero_subtitle: The Bruut platform is a versatile tool carrier. Discover all modules and attachments you can add for specific tasks in the field, greenhouse, or yard.
func_1_desc: Mowing at various heights, including 'topping' plants above ground level.
func_2_desc: Targeted weed control with AI, reducing chemical usage and drift. Based on the 'Open Weed Locator' project.
func_3_desc: Front or mid-mounted blade for leveling terrain, pushing feed/grass in stables, or cleaning silo's.
func_4_desc: Precise application and spreading of granular fertilizers.
func_5_desc: Mechanical weed control using rotating fingers in light soil.
func_6_desc: Spreading lime to improve soil pH levels and structure.
func_7_desc: Measuring crop height and health to create task maps for nitrogen or phosphate.
func_8_desc: Front or rear-mounted seat, with the option to widen the frame tubes at the sides.
func_9_desc: Integrated panels to extend battery life and provide sustainable power during operation.
func_10_desc: Evenly spreading straw, specially designed for use between vegetable rows.
func_11_desc: Rear-mounted hitch for pulling trailers and other rolling equipment.
func_12_desc: Motorized wheelbarrow-style container for transporting and dumping loose materials.
func_13_desc: Large front-mounted brush or electrically driven radial brush for surface cleaning.
func_14_desc: Additional power supply modules to be installed between the frames.
func_15_desc: Auxiliary power source for additional electricity generation or mechanical power.
func_16_desc: Pumping water from ditches for local irrigation or crop spraying.
func_17_desc: Digging trenches to drain standing water from fields efficiently.
func_18_desc: Even distribution of sawdust or bedding material in stables.
func_19_desc: Machine for initial crop sowing or overseeding existing grassland.
func_20_desc: Transporting and processing compost within the main frame structure.
func_21_desc: Ballast weights to improve traction and vehicle balance for heavy tasks.
func_22_desc: Flexible arm with blades for mowing under fences and around obstacles.
func_23_desc: External hydraulic power source for specialized agricultural tools.
func_24_desc: Standard lifting system for attaching various agricultural implements.
func_25_desc: Soil cultivation specifically for vegetable gardens or light plots.
func_26_desc: Protective enclosure or housing for the operator.
func_27_desc: Improving soil structure and air supply in grassland.
func_28_desc: Measuring and mapping soil density at specific data points.
func_29_desc: Internal power unit within the frame for additional traction or electricity.
